title: libanotis graveolens
intro: Libanotis graveolens, also known as Savory, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its small, white flowers and distinctive, savory flavor. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and antifungal properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Libanotis graveolens include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other minor ailments.
